title: Caerphilly Council sells solar farm to Fuse Energy - Business Live
snippet: Caerphilly Council sells solar farm to Fuse Energy  Business Live
ai_summary: Fuse Energy has acquired a solar farm asset from Caerphilly Council, indicating competitive expansion in the generator/asset ownership space where tem operates.
ai_reasoning: Fuse Energy is a named competitor in tem's I&C renewable space. Asset acquisition by competitors signals market movement and potential competitive pressure in generator relationships. Score of 6 (not 8) because this is a single asset deal rather than a major strategic shift or product launch, and no direct impact on tem's operations is evident from the snippet.
